auditor: Blouin, Julien, Potvin, Société de comptables professionnels agréés
economic_notes: Nation has significant investments in commercial enterprises including Pêcheries Shipek S.E.C. (49.99%), Société de gestion Ekuanitshinnuat Inc. (100%), Sécurité Innu Inc. (100%), Pourvoirie du lac Allard et rivière Mingan Inc. (100%), Voyages inter-nations & associés Inc. (33.33%), Compagnie Atautshuap Inc. (100%), and 9152-0759 Québec Inc. (50%). Economically dependent on Indigenous Services Canada and ISC-FNIHB.
notes: Audit is qualified because financial statements of four subsidiaries and three satellite organizations were not audited; these are accounted for using modified equity method. Nation is located in Quebec. Large non-recurring Rio Tinto contribution of $2,500,000 received in 2020 (none in 2019). Deferred revenue includes $15,906,100 from Hydro-Québec. Significant quote-part (equity pickup) loss of $2,888,830 from subsidiaries and gain of $795,618 from satellite organizations included in net deficit. Deferred revenue total of $20,883,651 plus surplus de contribution fixe reporté of $2,159,053 = $23,042,704. Current liabilities include bank overdraft $400,000 plus accounts payable $2,081,646. Remuneration schedule not found in extracted text — honoraires Chef et Conseillers listed as $60,000 total expense. No breakdown by individual provided in extracted text.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
